rationale.R1.1: Identifies a conceptual issue (mismatch between expected value and per-step obligation) but the reframing is not fully developed.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies some inconsistencies in the argument chain but doesn't walk it end-to-end.
rationale.R1.6: Improves clarity and flow, removing run-on sentences and filler words.
rationale.RX.1: Does not disclose uncertainty about any claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions but drifts slightly in focus.
rationale.RX.5: Lacks traceability for the changes made.
